text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day by stretching and drinking a glass of water. Then, I have a light breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. My workday begins at 9:00, and I spend most of it at a desk, attending meetings and answering emails. Around lunchtime, I take a 30-minute walk to stay active. In the evening, I do some light exercise, like yoga or jogging, after dinner. I also read a book or listen to music before going to bed at 10:00. This routine helps me stay healthy and productive every day.
